text:
There was once an old owl who loved quiet nights. She would sit atop her oak tree surveying her silent land. One night, stars twinkled brighter than usual.

A young fox decided to explore farther. Twilight chased him away from comforts.

Late night darkness found foxes asleep.

The wise owl saw him from aloft.

She decided fox deserved truth.

She swooped down.

fox cried.

She flew away.

Next day fox rested quietly.



Think owl thinks?

Just think wise owl wise?


Just think.



Just owl think?


Just owl think?

Just fox sleep.





Just think owl owl owl.?


Just think.



Just owl owlnowl owls.




Just think owls.



Just owls.



Just owl.





Just owl owl owl.



Just think owl.







Just owl owl owl owl.





Just think owls.



There...That ends.



You think owl believes?

Just think owl think?

Just owl think owl owl owl owl.







Just owls.




Just owl owl owl owl.



Just think
